:host{display:block;min-height:100%}*{box-sizing:border-box}.app{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb;padding:24px}.layout{width:100%;max-width:760px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);align-items:start;gap:16px}.column{min-width:0;background:#020617;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #1f2937;padding:16px;display:grid;gap:12px}.title{margin:0;font-size:18px;font-weight:700}.subtitle{margin:4px 0 0;font-size:13px;color:#9ca3af}.product-list,.cart-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:grid;gap:8px}.product-card,.cart-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #1f2937;background:#020617}.product-main,.cart-info{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:3px}.product-name,.cart-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600}.product-price{font-size:13px;color:#a3e635}.stock-count{font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8}.cart-header{display:grid;gap:4px}.cart-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:12px;color:#9ca3af}.unit-price,.line-total,.subtotal,.discount,.grand-total{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.times,.equals{opacity:.7}.cart-actions{display:flex;gap:6px}button{border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #374151;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb;padding:7px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}button:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#a3e635}button:focus-visible,input:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #bef264;outline-offset:2px}button:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}button.ghost{background:transparent}button.danger{border-color:#f97316;color:#f97316}.empty{margin:4px 0;font-size:13px;color:#6b7280}.promo-form{display:grid;gap:6px;padding-top:4px;border-top:1px solid #1f2937}.promo-form label{font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.promo-controls{display:flex;gap:8px}.promo-input{min-width:0;flex:1;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:10px;background:#0f172a;color:#f8fafc;padding:8px 10px}.apply-promo{border-color:#84cc16;color:#d9f99d}.promo-feedback,.checkout-status{min-height:18px;margin:0;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:12px}.totals{display:grid;gap:7px;margin:0;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;background:#0f172a}.totals div{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.totals dt,.totals dd{margin:0}.totals dt{color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px}.grand-total-row{padding-top:7px;border-top:1px solid #334155}.grand-total-row dt,.grand-total{color:#f8fafc!important;font-weight:800}.checkout-button{width:100%;border-color:#84cc16;background:#365314;color:#f7fee7}.visually-hidden{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}@media(max-width:680px){.app{padding:14px}.layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.product-card,.cart-row{align-items:flex-start}.cart-row{flex-direction:column}.cart-actions{align-self:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap}.promo-controls{align-items:stretch;flex-direction:column}}
